channel.title: Knowledge Base — paype.cc
channel.description: Everything you need to know about paype.cc — search across FAQ, glossary, guides, docs, blog, and roadmap. One place for every answer.

item.title: Blog
item.description: Product updates, payments thinking, crypto policy, and behind-the-scenes from the paype team. RSS feed available.

item.title: Documentation
item.description: Platform documentation for paype.cc — API reference, security architecture, compliance program details, and technical specifications.

item.title: Glossary
item.description: Plain-English definitions of every paype.cc term: MSB, KYC/KYB, UBO, ACH, SWIFT, SEPA, cryptographic audit trail, and more.

item.title: Guides
item.description: Step-by-step walkthroughs for paype.cc: open your account, send your first payment, create sub-accounts, set up your introducer link, and more.
